message:
feat(runtime): add replica_psync_request() for partial resync support

Add replica_psync_request() method that returns the PSYNC arguments
(replid, offset) based on the current replication state. When state
is "reconnect", returns the known replid and primary_offset for
partial resync (PSYNC replid offset). Otherwise returns ("?", -1)
for full resync (PSYNC ? -1). This prepares for the replica to
attempt partial resync before falling back to full FULLRESYNC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
